data.name: 外道勇者一行
data.detailed_description:
The world is threatened by monsters sent by the Demon Lord. To counter him, Dragons which are deities who reside in another dimension, bestow powers upon champions known as “Dracovalis”.

In a small, unremarkable village, Imos lives with his sister Tori, helping her run a potion shop. Along with his sister, he spends his days with his childhood friend (and a Dracovalis) Lotia, a gentle nun Krimina, and a tomboy princess Aina.

However, this all changes when an order is made for all Dracovalis, including Lotia, to hunt down the Demon Lord.

Features

  • Classic RPG experience

  • A dramatic story

  • Turn-based combat

  • Combo attack for quicker battles

  • A hard mode for added difficulty
data.about_the_game:
The world is threatened by monsters sent by the Demon Lord. To counter him, Dragons which are deities who reside in another dimension, bestow powers upon champions known as “Dracovalis”.

In a small, unremarkable village, Imos lives with his sister Tori, helping her run a potion shop. Along with his sister, he spends his days with his childhood friend (and a Dracovalis) Lotia, a gentle nun Krimina, and a tomboy princess Aina.

However, this all changes when an order is made for all Dracovalis, including Lotia, to hunt down the Demon Lord.

Features

  • Classic RPG experience

  • A dramatic story

  • Turn-based combat

  • Combo attack for quicker battles

  • A hard mode for added difficulty
data.short_description: Imos lives his peaceful life helping his sister Tori run a potion shop in a quiet village. However, when an order is given for all Dracovalis to hunt down the Demon Lord, that peace is shattered forever.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
